section.title: Decision
section.p: Pick a payment provider for Faion Pro tier — reversal cost: 4 weeks of integration work and ~$8k contract cancellation.

section.title: Criteria + weights (locked 2026-05-23T08:00Z)
section.code: | criterion | weight | |--------------------|--------| | TCO 3yr | 0.30 | | Integration effort | 0.20 | | Geo coverage | 0.15 | | Risk (vendor lock) | 0.15 | | SCA / 3DS support | 0.10 | | Reporting fit | 0.10 |

section.title: Scores
section.p: Each cell carries an evidence URL (vendor TCO sheets, internal integration RFC, geo coverage matrix).

section.title: Sensitivity
section.p: 5000 Monte Carlo runs, ±20% weight jitter: vendor-a wins 78% of runs, do-nothing 18%, vendor-b 4%. rank_flip_rate top-2 = 0.18 → vendor-a vs do-nothing flagged as unstable.

section.title: Signoff
section.p: Pedro Silva (CFO) signs at 2026-05-23T11:00Z. Rationale: "Vendor A wins composite by 0.7 but sensitivity shows do-nothing is the second-most-likely winner under realistic weight uncertainty. Decision: pilot vendor-a 90 days, retain Stripe-only fallback. Re-evaluate after pilot."
